title: PresenceStatusSetInput::default() silently sends id=empty string
description: PresenceStatusSetInput derives Default, so Default::default() yields id=empty string. This compiles and produces a JMAP request with update key empty string, which is semantically invalid. A caller who builds the struct incrementally (let mut input = PresenceStatusSetInput::default(); input.presence = Some(...); client.presence_status_set(&session, &input).await) forgets to fill in id and gets a silent server error or incorrect update. The id field should not participate in Default — either remove the derive and implement manually omitting id, or change id type to Option<&str> and validate at call time.
